titles.title: Cobwood: Enhancing Forest Economics Model Reusability Through Labelled Panel Data Structures

institution.institution_name: European Commission, Joint Research Centre (JRC), Ispra, Italy

citation.volume_title: The global forest products model: Structure, estimation, and applications
citation.author: Buongiorno
citation.unstructured_citation: Buongiorno, J., Zhu, S., Zhang, D., Turner, J., & Tomberlin, D. (2003). The global forest products model: Structure, estimation, and applications. Elsevier.

citation.article_title: GFPMX: A cobweb model of the global forest sector, with an application to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic
citation.author: Buongiorno
citation.unstructured_citation: Buongiorno, J. (2021). GFPMX: A cobweb model of the global forest sector, with an application to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. Sustainability, 13(10), 5507. https://doi.org/10.3390/su13105507

citation.author: Jonsson
citation.journal_title: Luxembourg: Publications Office of the European Union

citation.article_title: The global forest sector model EFI-GTM—the model structure

citation.unstructured_citation: Kallio, A. M. I., Moiseyev, A., Solberg, B., & others. (2004). The global forest sector model EFI-GTM—the model structure. European Forest Institute-Internal Report, 15.

citation.author: Rougieux
citation.journal_title: EU biomass supply, uses, governance and regenerative actions

Renner (Eds.), EU biomass supply, uses, governance and regenerative actions. Publications Office of the European Union. https://doi.org/10.2760/6511190

citation.author: Lauri

citation.volume_title: Simulating future wood consumption and the impacts on Europe’s forest sink to 2070

citation.article_title: TiMBA (Timber market Model for policy-Based Analysis)
